21110201102222110122011122121210100200000012021120 - ASI: 31

Rules:
  00 = 0 * 0
  01 = 0 * 1
  11 = 1 * 1
  20 = 2 * 0
  21 = 2 * 1
  22 = 2 * 2
  110 = 11 * 0
  112 = 11 * 2
  120 = 1 * 20
  0000 = 00 * 00
  0020 = 00 * 20
  0120 = 01 * 20
  1101 = 11 * 01
  2121 = 21 * 21
  2201 = 22 * 01
  11022 = 110 * 22
  21110 = 21 * 110
  21120 = 21 * 120
  010020 = 01 * 0020
  212121 = 21 * 2121
  221101 = 22 * 1101
  2011022 = 20 * 11022
  2201112 = 2201 * 112
  00000120 = 0000 * 0120
  211102011022 = 21110 * 2011022
  212121010020 = 212121 * 010020
  0000012021120 = 00000120 * 21120
  2211012201112 = 221101 * 2201112
  2111020110222211012201112 = 211102011022 * 2211012201112
  2121210100200000012021120 = 212121010020 * 0000012021120
  21110201102222110122011122121210100200000012021120 = 2111020110222211012201112 * 2121210100200000012021120
